question.text: Which types of orders are NOT currently available on Indian exchanges as per SEBI?

answer.text: GTC, GTD, AON, and MF orders

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Currently unavailable: GTC (Good Till Cancelled), GTD (Good Till Date), AON (All or None), MF (Minimum Fill). Available: Market, Limit, Stop Loss, DAY, IOC, DQ. **The Trap:** These order types exist conceptually in trading theory but are not implemented on Indian exchanges. **Cross-Exam Context:** Order type availability is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The available order types (Market, Limit, Stop Loss with DAY/IOC/DQ conditions) cover most trading needs.
